seoTitle: Weld Range vs Wellard — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Weld Range and Wellard. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Weld Range vs Wellard: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Weld Range and Wellard.
heading: Weld Range vs Wellard — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weld Range, Western Australia and Wellard, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Weld Range has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wellard (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weld Range or Wellard safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weld Range has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Wellard scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weld Range scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Wellard scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weld Range or Wellard?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Weld Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
